chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Cr. Misc. Application No.S-151 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 22-09-2025 Mr. Habibullah G. Ghouri, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Altaf Hussain Surhio, advocate for respondent No.1 & 5. Mr. Nazir Ahmed Bhangwar, Deputy Prosecutor General. -------- Mr. Ghouri does not press this application under instructions and submits that the applicant intends to avail alternate remedy available under the law. Order accordingly. The Applicant is at liberty to avail the remedy so available under the law. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
